name: 小熊香蕉画布v3
description:
Ver 3.0
- Add Model Selection (Banana / Banana Pro)
- Banana Pro requires personal API Key selection
- Improve text-to-image workflow
- Support undo/redo across the board

An interactive, Banana Canvas application built with Nano Banana. Users can pan and zoom the canvas and place elements on it. The canvas provides a boundless space for creativity and organization.
